name: SysML v2
description: OMG Systems Modeling Language v2 — next-generation MBSE language with a formal metamodel and textual + graphical notation. OMG spec: https://www.omg.org/spec/SysML/ · https://www.omgsysml.org/ · Reference implementation & releases: https://github.com/Systems-Modeling/SysML-v2-Release
